metadata.name: Issue an Emergency Alert System (EAS) Broadcast

description: A local authority has issued an AMBER Alert, which must be broadcast immediately across all TV channels in the affected region.

nodes.task_description: Receive the authenticated AMBER Alert message from the authorities.

expected_outcome.value: Agent receives the alert text and the geographic area to be targeted.

nodes.task_description: Interrupt all current programming in the specified region to broadcast the alert.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully triggers the EAS override system.

nodes.task_description: Log the broadcast for regulatory compliance.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a log entry detailing the time and duration of the alert.
